records.m_Talk_ENG: Impressive.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Impressive.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Impressive.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I thought I had a decent knack for this kind of gamble myself...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I thought I had a decent knack for this kind of gamble myself...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I thought I had a decent knack for this kind of gamble myself...

records.m_Talk_ENG: To think someone could raise the stakes this far, I wouldn't even dare hand out my card anymore.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To think someone could raise the stakes this far, I wouldn't even dare hand out my card anymore.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To think someone could raise the stakes this far, I wouldn't even dare hand out my card anymore.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I knew Benedict was receiving some kind of support from the faction.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I knew Benedict was receiving some kind of support from the faction.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I knew Benedict was receiving some kind of support from the faction.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's why I helped him. Implicitly, Charade is the Society's estate
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's why I helped him. Implicitly, Charade is the Society's estate
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's why I helped him. Implicitly, Charade is the Society's estate

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whether Benedict succeeded or failed, the Society and the faction were bound to clash over this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whether Benedict succeeded or failed, the Society and the faction were bound to clash over this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whether Benedict succeeded or failed, the Society and the faction were bound to clash over this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: At the same time, that was as far as things could go.
records.m_Talk_DEU: At the same time, that was as far as things could go.
records.m_Talk_FRA: At the same time, that was as far as things could go.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dealing with a turncoat who caused trouble within the territory was strictly the Law Department's jurisdiction.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dealing with a turncoat who caused trouble within the territory was strictly the Law Department's jurisdiction.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dealing with a turncoat who caused trouble within the territory was strictly the Law Department's jurisdiction.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The current Regina wouldn't have paid any mind to something that trivial.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The current Regina wouldn't have paid any mind to something that trivial.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The current Regina wouldn't have paid any mind to something that trivial.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But once that child stepped into the game, everything turned upside down.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But once that child stepped into the game, everything turned upside down.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But once that child stepped into the game, everything turned upside down.

records.m_Talk_ENG: With one useless vessel getting involved, Benedict had no choice but to use a new vessel.
records.m_Talk_DEU: With one useless vessel getting involved, Benedict had no choice but to use a new vessel.
records.m_Talk_FRA: With one useless vessel getting involved, Benedict had no choice but to use a new vessel.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And that dragged even Prydwen into a situation they could no longer stay out of.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And that dragged even Prydwen into a situation they could no longer stay out of.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And that dragged even Prydwen into a situation they could no longer stay out of.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And as a result...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And as a result...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And as a result...

records.m_Talk_ENG: All the efforts of those who tried to protect Charade ultimately spiraled into catastrophe.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All the efforts of those who tried to protect Charade ultimately spiraled into catastrophe.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All the efforts of those who tried to protect Charade ultimately spiraled into catastrophe.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Within the collapsing city, the Society and the faction are fighting, staking their very existence.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Within the collapsing city, the Society and the faction are fighting, staking their very existence.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Within the collapsing city, the Society and the faction are fighting, staking their very existence.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Truly a ruinous talent, Ms. Playwright.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Truly a ruinous talent, Ms. Playwright.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Truly a ruinous talent, Ms. Playwright.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If someone said all of this started from a single <color=#ffd34c>invitation</color>, who would ever believe it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If someone said all of this started from a single <color=#ffd34c>invitation</color>, who would ever believe it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If someone said all of this started from a single <color=#ffd34c>invitation</color>, who would ever believe it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's because a heartfelt letter carries that much power.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's because a heartfelt letter carries that much power.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's because a heartfelt letter carries that much power.

records.m_Talk_ENG: After all, the reason I started writing scripts was because of a single <color=#ffd34c>fan letter</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: After all, the reason I started writing scripts was because of a single <color=#ffd34c>fan letter</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: After all, the reason I started writing scripts was because of a single <color=#ffd34c>fan letter</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A fan letter...
records.m_Talk_DEU: A fan letter...
records.m_Talk_FRA: A fan letter...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Heh, I'm starting to like you more and more, scriptwriter.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Heh, I'm starting to like you more and more, scriptwriter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Heh, I'm starting to like you more and more, scriptwriter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So then, who exactly are you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So then, who exactly are you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So then, who exactly are you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: As far as I know, there's only one person in this world capable of writing a script like this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As far as I know, there's only one person in this world capable of writing a script like this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As far as I know, there's only one person in this world capable of writing a script like this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A mysterious actress, a genius scriptwriter, an international terrorist, a secret Administration agent, and...
records.m_Talk_DEU: A mysterious actress, a genius scriptwriter, an international terrorist, a secret Administration agent, and...
records.m_Talk_FRA: A mysterious actress, a genius scriptwriter, an international terrorist, a secret Administration agent, and...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Demon Lord Thagirion's Apostle, Swan Claire.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Demon Lord Thagirion's Apostle, Swan Claire.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Demon Lord Thagirion's Apostle, Swan Claire.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They say Swan can change her appearance freely through mirrors, don't they?
records.m_Talk_DEU: They say Swan can change her appearance freely through mirrors, don't they?
records.m_Talk_FRA: They say Swan can change her appearance freely through mirrors, don't they?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is the form you're wearing now just another one of your masks, Swan?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is the form you're wearing now just another one of your masks, Swan?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is the form you're wearing now just another one of your masks, Swan?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Swan...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Swan...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Swan...

records.m_Talk_ENG: That name was once my resolve.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That name was once my resolve.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That name was once my resolve.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A resolve to flee from the past and step onto a new stage.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A resolve to flee from the past and step onto a new stage.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A resolve to flee from the past and step onto a new stage.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even back then, and even now, I know this much.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even back then, and even now, I know this much.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even back then, and even now, I know this much.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That running away alone can never change anything...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That running away alone can never change anything...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That running away alone can never change anything...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I only ever wanted to be a swan, but never was I to become one.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I only ever wanted to be a swan, but never was I to become one.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I only ever wanted to be a swan, but never was I to become one.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Perhaps I envied the graceful swan, regretting my powerless days of obscurity.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Perhaps I envied the graceful swan, regretting my powerless days of obscurity.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Perhaps I envied the graceful swan, regretting my powerless days of obscurity.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But now, I no longer run from myself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But now, I no longer run from myself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But now, I no longer run from myself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's why I am Irene Adler...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's why I am Irene Adler...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's why I am Irene Adler...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The name of the role I chose for myself on this new stage.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The name of the role I chose for myself on this new stage.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The name of the role I chose for myself on this new stage.
